title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 22 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 22 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 22 2026
summary:
Main
The DCE iron ore futures continued to hit boƩom today, with the most-traded I2609 contract closing at 739.5 yuan/mt,down 0.87%. Port spot prices fell by 3-5 yuan/mt from pre-holiday levels. Traders showed low selling enthusiasm, with many holding off from offering.
